name: vodmal
description: AI-powered plugins for development tools by Dmitry Vorobyev.

plugins.name: vdm
plugins.description: SDLC workflow plugins: docs-sync (documentation synchronization), learn (knowledge capture), changelog (project change tracking).

plugins.name: vdm-git
plugins.description: Git safety plugin: blocks commit/push until user confirms, ships `git-guard-prepare` helper for file-based commit hand-off, enforces commit message format.
